scripts.docs:pdf:all: npx vitepress-export-pdf export docs --config pdf-configs/all.mts --outDir artifacts/pdf
scripts.docs:pdf:datasheet: npx vitepress-export-pdf export docs --config pdf-configs/datasheet.mts --outDir artifacts/pdf
scripts.docs:pdf:app-guide: npx vitepress-export-pdf export docs --config pdf-configs/app-guide.mts --outDir artifacts/pdf
scripts.docs:pdf:product-manual: npx vitepress-export-pdf export docs --config pdf-configs/product-manual.mts --outDir artifacts/pdf
scripts.docs:pdf:series-manual: npx vitepress-export-pdf export docs --config pdf-configs/series-manual.mts --outDir artifacts/pdf
scripts.docs:pdf:legal: npx vitepress-export-pdf export docs --config pdf-configs/legal.mts --outDir artifacts/pdf
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean:cache && npm ci && npm run docs:build
scripts.rebuild:fast: npm run clean:cache && npm run docs:build
